bug_fixes:
# *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*
- area: outlier detection
arguments.new_string:
bug_fixes:
# *Changes expected to improve the state of the world and are unlikely to have negative effects*
- area: udp
  change: |
    Fixed a crash in the UDP proxy filter when a cluster is updated via CDS (Cluster Discovery Service).
    The filter now correctly updates its internal cluster info map when cluster updates occur, preventing
    dangling pointer dereferences.
- area: outlier detection

target_files: 829-// test that cluster updates are properly handled when a cluster is updated via cds.

arguments.pattern: Fixed a crash in the UDP proxy filter
